title: UniversalSpawn
description: Set the spawn and teleport there. Ideal for hub servers!
body:
Simple plugin that teleports the player to spawn when they type /spawn.

## Commands

### /spawn 
- Teleport to the spawn location.
- Requires permission: `none`

### /spawn set 
- Allows players to set the spawn location.
- Requires permission: `universalspawn.spawn.set`

## Config
```
teleport-on-join:
  enabled: true
teleport-on-death:
  enabled: true
teleport-out-of-void:
  enabled: true
  check-height: 0
spawn:
  world: world
  x: 0.0
  y: 64.0
  z: 0.0
  yaw: 0.0
  pitch: 0.0
